title: Reconcile a durable mobile edit outbox safely
prompt: Repair reconnect reconciliation in `OutboxReconciler`. Edits must be sent strictly from the durable queue head, and an `Applied` or `AlreadyApplied` reply is the only acknowledgement that removes an entry. `RetryLater`, transport failures, and cancellation must leave that entry queued with its stable operation id so a new reconciler can safely retry it. A `Conflict` reply must durably retain the entry as a visible conflict (including the server version and body), stop the run, and block all later edits until the conflict is resolved. Conflict resolution replaces the changed attempt's identity but keeps its queue position, and retries of that replacement must reuse its new identity. Preserve the public API and result counts, keep cancellation observable, and maintain restart-safe ordering and sequence allocation. Do not modify the protected test project, test runner, NuGet configuration, or `.gitignore`.
